nasb.text: Their numbered men, in the numbering of every male from a month old and upward, even their numbered men were 7,500.

esv.text: Their listing according to the number of all the males from a month old and upward was 7,500.

cnv.text: 根據所有男丁的數目，一個月及以上，被數點的，共有七千五百人。

ccb.text: 其中年龄在一个月以上的男性共七千五百人。
